name: IRC_LI_ACTIVATION_CONFIG
description: Stores the activation details of LinkedIn integration in Recruiting

columns.Name: CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: PROVISIONING_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_TP_PARTNER_PROVISNGS

columns.Name: APP_ID
columns.Comments: Unique ID that represents the provisioning application created for the integration

columns.Name: APP_URN
columns.Comments: URN representing the provisioning application created for the integration

columns.Name: APP_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the provisioning application created for the integration

columns.Name: APP_DESC
columns.Comments: Brief description of the provisioning application created for the integration

columns.Name: VALID_DOMAINS
columns.Comments: List of fully qualified domain names allowed by the partner for the integration

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: URN representing the data-integration-context for the integration

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_NAME
columns.Comments: Customer facing name for the integration

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of integration supported by partner

columns.Name: TENANT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Role type needed for the integration

columns.Name: ONBOARDING_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code identifying the onboarding status of the integration. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_ONBOARDING_STATUS

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CONTRACT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_LI_CONTRACTS.

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code identifying the status of the integration in ORC. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_INTEGRATION_STATUS

columns.Name: LAST_ACTIVATED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who last activated the integration.

columns.Name: LAST_ACTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the integration was last activated.

columns.Name: LAST_INACTIVATED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who last inactivated the integration.

columns.Name: LAST_INACTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the integration was last inactivated.

columns.Name: USER_NAME
columns.Comments: To store user name sent to the third party (based on integration type column)

columns.Name: ADDL_INFO1_LAST_SENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Store the last time additional information is sent to the third party

columns.Name: COMPANY_URL
columns.Comments: To store company URL to be sent to the third party (based on integration type column)

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: To store integration partner notification status if available for a given integration type. ORA_ENABLED or ORA_DISABLED

columns.Name: EASY_APPLY_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments:
To store Easy apply status.
Default: ORA_ENABLED. ORA_ENABLED or ORA_DISABLED
